ddls:
CREATE TABLE "system_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "factory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the factory the note belongs to */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the factory the note belongs to
Timestamp when the note was created
